description: Read the transcript linked to one selected session.

all_namespaces.description: Bypass namespace scoping and read across all namespaces.

follow.description: CLI only: follow appended transcript bytes.

max_bytes.description: Maximum bytes to return from the end of the transcript.

namespace.description: Namespace slug to scope this read. Overrides the caller session namespace fallback.

selector.description: Selector that must match exactly one session with transcript logs.

name: logs
